name: Format Number to USD
short_description: Formats a given number into a USD currency string with two decimal places and thousands separators.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numeric value to be formatted as USD.

name: Percentage Formatter
short_description: Formats a numerical value into a string representing a percentage with two decimal places.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numerical value to format as a percentage (e.g., 0.15 for 15%).

name: Asset Turnover Ratio
short_description: Calculates the Asset Turnover Ratio based on total sales and total assets.

inputs.name: total_sales
inputs.description: Total sales generated by the company

inputs.name: total_assets
inputs.description: Total value of assets owned by the company

name: Asset Turnover Comparison: Two Periods
short_description: Compares the Asset Turnover Ratio for two periods where sales are constant but total assets change between periods.

inputs.name: total_sales
inputs.description: Total sales for both periods (assumed constant).

inputs.name: assets_last_year
inputs.description: Total assets in the first period (Year 1).

inputs.name: asset_change
inputs.description: The change in total assets from Year 1 to Year 2.

name: Asset Turnover (Average Assets)
short_description: Calculates the Asset Turnover Ratio using Total Sales and the average of beginning and ending Total Assets.

inputs.name: total_sales
inputs.description: Total Sales for the period

inputs.name: beginning_assets
inputs.description: Total Assets at the beginning of the period

inputs.name: ending_assets
inputs.description: Total Assets at the end of the period

name: Asset Turnover with Depreciation Adjustment
short_description: Calculates Asset Turnover Ratio before and after adjusting total assets for depreciation.

inputs.name: total_sales
inputs.description: Total revenue generated by the company.

inputs.name: total_assets
inputs.description: Total value of a company's assets before depreciation.

inputs.name: depreciation
inputs.description: Amount of depreciation to be subtracted from total assets.

name: Asset Turnover: Investment vs. Sales Push
short_description: Two strategic scenarios: (1) Add new investment and simultaneous depreciation (assets change). (2) Push sales by a specified percentage with assets held at current level.

inputs.name: total_sales
inputs.description: Current total sales

inputs.name: total_assets
inputs.description: Current total assets

inputs.name: new_investment
inputs.description: Amount of new investment in assets

inputs.name: depreciation
inputs.description: Depreciation on existing assets

inputs.name: sales_increase_pct
inputs.description: Percentage increase in sales (e.g., 10 for 10%)

name: Financial Problem Template Generator
short_description: Generates instances of various financial problem templates with different random seeds and writes the results to a JSON file.

inputs.name: output_file
inputs.description: The path to the output JSON file where generated problems will be saved.

inputs.name: num_instances
inputs.description: The number of problem instances to generate for each template.
